stemHtml: According to OPS regulations, a windshield wiper or equivalent means to maintain a clear portion of the windshield during precipitation is required at each pilot station to operate an aeroplane with a…

options.a: maximum approved passenger configuration of more than 6 seats
options.b: maximum certificated take-off mass of more than 5700 kg
options.c: maximum approved passenger configuration of more than 9 seats
options.d: maximum certificated take-off mass of more than 15 000 kg
